title: Service and Conservancy Charges (S&CC) Rebate
text:
Service and Conservancy Charges (S&CC) Rebate - SupportGoWhere
Service and Conservancy Charges (S&CC) Rebate
Share link
Quarterly rebates to offset S&CC fees for HDB households. Eligible households will receive 1.5 to 3.5 months of the GST Voucher (GSTV) – S&CC Rebate.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
1.5 to 3.5 months of S&CC Rebate in each Financial Year
Rebates will be given out in January, April, July and October
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Offsets between 1.5 and 3.5 months of S&CC

Eligible households will receive their S&CC rebates in January, April, July, and October

Who is this for?

A HDB household will be eligible for the S&CC rebate if all the criteria below are fulfilled:

There must be at least one Singapore Citizen flat owner or occupier in the flat

The flat owner(s) and essential occupier(s) of the flat do not own or have any interest in a private property

The flat owner(s) have not rented out the whole flat

How to apply?

No application required

S&CC rebates will be credited directly to your household's S&CC account managed by your respective Town Council

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB residents can check or enquire about their household's eligibility for GSTV – S&CC Rebate using these e-Services for purchased flats and rental flats.

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
